message:
feat(conformance): add counter-example mining binary (C6)

Add mine_counter_examples binary that runs CGSE determinism
verification by generating random graphs and checking for witness
hash consistency across multiple executions of each algorithm.

Usage: cargo run -p fnx-conformance --bin mine_counter_examples

Supports:
- Configurable graph count, iterations, density, and seed
- Algorithm filtering via --algorithm flag
- JSONL output format for CI integration
- Mining across 10 of 12 reference algorithms (MST/SCC pending)

Closes: franken_networkx-y4nn (C6)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -17,5 +17,9 @@ fnx-views = { path = "../fnx-views" }
 serde = { version = "1.0.228", features = ["derive"] }
 serde_json = "1.0.149"
 
+[[bin]]
+name = "mine_counter_examples"
+path = "src/bin/mine_counter_examples.rs"
+
 [dev-dependencies]
 proptest = "1.10.0"

@@ -0,0 +1,32 @@
+{
+  "suite": "graph_core_regression_v1",
+  "mode": "strict",
+  "fixture_id": "regression::franken_networkx-3pdp::eulerian_triangle_with_isolate",
+  "threat_class": "historical_regression",
+  "replay_command": "rch exec -- CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target-codex cargo run -q -p fnx-conformance --bin run_smoke -- --fixture regressions/franken_networkx-3pdp/eulerian_triangle_with_isolate_strict.json --mode strict",
+  "operations": [
+    { "op": "add_node", "node": "a" },
+    { "op": "add_node", "node": "b" },
+    { "op": "add_node", "node": "c" },
+    { "op": "add_node", "node": "z" },
+    { "op": "add_edge", "left": "a", "right": "b" },
+    { "op": "add_edge", "left": "b", "right": "c" },
+    { "op": "add_edge", "left": "c", "right": "a" },
+    { "op": "is_eulerian_query" },
+    { "op": "has_eulerian_path_query" },
+    { "op": "is_semieulerian_query" }
+  ],
+  "expected": {
+    "graph": {
+      "nodes": ["a", "b", "c", "z"],
+      "edges": [
+        { "left": "a", "right": "b", "attrs": {} },
+        { "left": "a", "right": "c", "attrs": {} },
+        { "left": "b", "right": "c", "attrs": {} }
+      ]
+    },
+    "is_eulerian": false,
+    "has_eulerian_path": false,
+    "is_semieulerian": false
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+{
+  "schema_version": "1.0.0",
+  "originating_bead_id": "franken_networkx-3pdp",
+  "title": "Eulerian parity: isolates + null graph + source validation",
+  "bug_class": "historical_regression",
+  "close_reason": "Fix Eulerian null-graph handling, isolate checks, source validation, and error messages",
+  "fixtures": [
+    "eulerian_triangle_with_isolate_strict.json"
+  ],
+  "notes": "Tier D historical regression fixture preserving the isolate-sensitive Eulerian parity case from the originating bead."
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,37 @@
+{
+  "suite": "components_regression_v1",
+  "mode": "strict",
+  "fixture_id": "regression::franken_networkx-690::global_minimum_node_cut_leaf_bottleneck",
+  "threat_class": "historical_regression",
+  "replay_command": "rch exec -- CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target-codex cargo run -q -p fnx-conformance --bin run_smoke -- --fixture regressions/franken_networkx-690/global_minimum_node_cut_leaf_bottleneck_strict.json --mode strict",
+  "operations": [
+    { "op": "add_node", "node": "a" },
+    { "op": "add_node", "node": "b" },
+    { "op": "add_node", "node": "c" },
+    { "op": "add_node", "node": "d" },
+    { "op": "add_node", "node": "e" },
+    { "op": "add_edge", "left": "a", "right": "b" },
+    { "op": "add_edge", "left": "a", "right": "c" },
+    { "op": "add_edge", "left": "b", "right": "c" },
+    { "op": "add_edge", "left": "b", "right": "d" },
+    { "op": "add_edge", "left": "c", "right": "d" },
+    { "op": "add_edge", "left": "d", "right": "e" },
+    { "op": "global_node_connectivity_query" },
+    { "op": "global_minimum_node_cut_query" }
+  ],
+  "expected": {
+    "graph": {
+      "nodes": ["a", "b", "c", "d", "e"],
+      "edges": [
+        { "left": "a", "right": "b", "attrs": {} },
+        { "left": "a", "right": "c", "attrs": {} },
+        { "left": "b", "right": "c", "attrs": {} },
+        { "left": "b", "right": "d", "attrs": {} },
+        { "left": "c", "right": "d", "attrs": {} },
+        { "left": "d", "right": "e", "attrs": {} }
+      ]
+    },
+    "global_node_connectivity": 1,
+    "global_minimum_node_cut": ["d"]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+{
+  "schema_version": "1.0.0",
+  "originating_bead_id": "franken_networkx-690",
+  "title": "Fix global_minimum_node_cut parity for node_connectivity_strict fixture",
+  "bug_class": "historical_regression",
+  "close_reason": "Fixed asymmetric undirected minimum_node_cut extraction and restored global_minimum_node_cut parity. Verified with targeted algorithm regressions, fnx-conformance smoke harness, cargo check, and clippy.",
+  "fixtures": [
+    "global_minimum_node_cut_leaf_bottleneck_strict.json"
+  ],
+  "notes": "Tier D historical regression fixture preserving the leaf-bottleneck graph that previously regressed global minimum node cut parity."
+}
